# useaitree
> A knowledge graph made of linked markdown files. Free. No account, no search API needed.

## How to use this
1. First, work out what this task actually needs. If it involves a specific tool/software/coding platform, or anything country-dependent, check /skills/index.md and load only the matching skill file before answering.
2. Look at the Full Site Map below. If your topic is listed, fetch that exact path directly.
3. If not listed, say so — do not guess a path that isn't listed here.

## Full Site Map
- /skills/index.md — start here if the task involves tools, coding platforms, or country-dependent answers
  - /skills/tool-accessibility-check.md — Skill: check before answering any tool/software question
  - /skills/ask-country-first.md — Skill: ask the user's country when it affects the answer
- /live-tools-database.md — manually verified, dated status of popular developer tools (free tiers, country restrictions)
- /profiles/troubleshooting-v1.md — the convention used for "how to fix X" pages

## Note on freshness
/live-tools-database.md is manually maintained and dated per entry specifically so it does not go stale silently. Always check the "Last verified" date on an entry before treating it as current.
